scope: single base image (task data lives inside the image); Python->JavaScript transpile-and-match

image.note: loaded from shared tar; no registry RepoDigest (offline load). Identity = image Id (config digest) + tar sha256.

scaffold: qwen-code native CLI, in-container, stream-json, --max-session-turns 40, workers=4
judge: RepoZero official eval_case: oracle-executable stdout vs generated node .mjs stdout, normalized-line equality across EVERY testcase sample (<=60); all_pass = ALL samples match (reward=1) else 0. NO model in the judge.

serving.probe: post-run (after). launch.sh preflight required /v1/models to contain 'Qwen3-Coder' BEFORE launch (before-evidence in launch.console.log).

eval_timeout_note: THE RUN USED 10s. RepoZero official hardcodes 5s (evaluate/eval_py2js_docker.py lines 52 & 59). 10s is 2x looser -> 98/400 is an UPPER bound vs official 5s. A+B dual-signed 24.5% REAL; the official 5s re-judge is disclosed below and in AUDIT_NOTES.md.
official_5s_all_pass: 95/400 = 23.75% (rejudge_official5s.json; serving-free re-judge of all 400 already-generated .mjs, same qwen node v20, only the timeout changed 10s->5s)
eval_node: mounted qwen node v20.20.2 (OpenSSL 3.0.19) via container PATH, NOT the image native node v18.19.1 (OpenSSL 3.0.13). Node-image-18 floor = 97/400 = 24.25% (0.25pp, A). Driver docstring corrected.
audit: A+B independent blind audits: 98/400=24.5% all_pass REAL (A re-judged 10 cases 7pass/3fail; B re-judged 3 + read official judge source byte-identical + verified commit on Mac). See AUDIT_NOTES.md.
